name: mnb/scraperkit
description: MNB ScraperKit V1.2.0 - professional PHP crawling and data extraction framework with Symfony Console commands, safe crawling, source connectors, pipeline exports, reports, and ZIP bundles.

suggest.ext-curl: Recommended for the cURL HTTP engine. The stream/file_get_contents engine works without cURL when allow_url_fopen is enabled.
suggest.ext-pdo: Needed only for database storage features.
